summary: Comprehensive testing of AccessJustice.Global platform completed. Backend APIs 86.7% success rate, frontend functionality mostly working with minor AI chat integration issues.

flaky_endpoints.issue: AI chat follow-up messages returning 500 error
flaky_endpoints.impact: Users cannot continue conversations with AI
Lawyers cannot register on the platform

integration_issues.issue: AI responds with error message instead of continuing conversation

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and CTAs
Navigation across all pages (Home, Get Legal Help, For Lawyers, AI Assistant, Contact, Login, Register)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AI chat follow-up functionality (500 error on subsequent messages in same session) and lawyer registration endpoint (500 error). Both issues appear to be backend API problems rather than frontend issues.
